arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo ‘over the moon’ as Forest’s dream season continues
arts.sum: Anthony Elanga’s early goal sealed victory over Manchester United.

arts.ttl: 'A special player' - resurgent Elanga has Forest dreaming
arts.sum: Anthony Elanga had left Manchester United in his past. On Tuesday, they trailed in his wake - to Nottingham Forest's benefit.

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Ruben Amorim explains Harry Maguire substitution and hints at new role for defender
arts.sum: The central defender was a goal-line clearance away from enjoying a dream return to action

arts.ttl: Every word from Ruben Amorim press conference after Nottingham Forest 1 Man Utd 0 on 1 April 2025
arts.sum: Harry Maguire, when he’s attacking in set-pieces, is maybe the best player we have in our team, so inside the box, you are not a defender, you are a striker. Harry Maguire up top, an unconventional, perhaps, way to try to score a goal, but he did get one of the best chances.

arts.ttl: Martin O'Neill, 73, makes brutal claim about Man United star - insisting HE could have played at the same level in Nottingham Forest defeat
arts.sum: Martin O'Neill rubbed salt in the wound of Man United on Tuesday night with a brutal putdown during his post-match analysis of the Red Devils' 1-0 defeat at Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Almost a saviour - is makeshift striker Maguire sign of Man Utd demise?
arts.sum: Makeshift striker Harry Maguire coming closest to rescuing a point for Manchester United at Nottingham Forest illustrates the attacking struggles of Ruben Amorim's side.

arts.ttl: Amorim explains makeshift forward role for Maguire
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has explained his decision to play defender Harry Maguire as a makeshift forward in the final moments of the defeat to Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Manchester United highlights and reaction as Anthony Elanga scores winner
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: A full recap of events from the City Ground as Man United were beaten 1-0 by Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Anthony Elanga reminds Manchester United of lesson they continuously fail to learn
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest 1-0 Manchester United: Anthony Elanga’s solo effort epitomised where the Red Devils have struggled this season

arts.ttl: 'I don't lie to myself': Ruben Amorim reacts as Manchester United slump to Nottingham Forest defeat
arts.sum: Red Devils lacked a cutting edge in attack as they fell to a 1-0 loss against Nottingham Forest
